text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Aptitude.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Skeletal structure. Muscle composition. Each
racer is born with her own unique form.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the world of Umamusume racing, finishing first
or last may come down to whether you're fit for
that particular track.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Of course, aptitude can change with effort.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But sometimes, the time necessary for that effort
may be too precious.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
An athlete's time in the limelight is priceless and
short-lived.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As a trainer, how can I nurture my trainee's skills
so that she may shine and succeed?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: These are challenges every trainer must face.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Summer is over. Today, I'm making our final
preparations for the upcoming Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
First, I'll finish warming up. A light workout on
600 meters of turf should be...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Nothing, I just thought I saw something over
there.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: K-King! What should I do?!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Special Week? What are you doing here?

text_block_list.name: Main Reporter
text_block_list.text:
Special Week! I was so moved by your fierce
performance at the Derby!

text_block_list.name: Young Reporter
text_block_list.text:
Special Week! You're planning to run in the
Kikuka Sho, right? Are you aiming for the title of
"strongest Umamusume"?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: P-p-please! Everyone, calm down!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh... I'm sorry, King. I'm just not used to these
interviews yet.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Wh-what should I do? Wh-what should I say to
them?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
...I mean, all you have to do is answer the
questions they ask.

text_block_list.name: Veteran Reporter
text_block_list.text: Special Week! Who do you consider your rival?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: My r-rival? My rival... Ummm... W-well...

text_block_list.name: King Halo's Mother
text_block_list.text:
It's been a good while since I've seen someone
capture the hearts of the crowd with their running
like Special Week.

text_block_list.name: Tourist at Food Stall
text_block_list.text:
Man, I really admire Special Week. She's honest,
upfront, and super determined!

text_block_list.name: Tourist in Swimsuit
text_block_list.text:
Me too, me too! And she's got such good
judgment, observing Seiun Sky.

text_block_list.name: Veteran Reporter
text_block_list.text:
I know! It's Seiun Sky, right? She's the favorite for
the next long-distance race.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Umm... Sei?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
She did tell me she was going to run in the Kikuka
Sho and the spring Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Reporters
text_block_list.text: Ooohhh!

text_block_list.name: Main Reporter
text_block_list.text:
Incredible! Is this your formal declaration of
rivalry with Seiun Sky?! This is a big scoop!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
What?! That's not what I—hey! King! Don't
leeeave! I can't do this alone!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
You're doing fine. The reporters seem perfectly
smitten with your responses.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Come on, Trainer. Let's finish warming up.
choice_data_list: You sure she'll be okay on her own?
You sure she'll be okay on her own?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: It's okay. I have better things to do.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Don't waste your time worrying about her either.
The Kikuka Sho is just around the corner.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And with that, King Halo dashes off on the
600-meter practice turf.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Whooosh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She accelerates and continues to increase her
speed even further. I think I've discovered her
specialty...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant... How was I?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
If you ask me, I think I'm good enough to beat
Sky and Special Week!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Considering her running from the past up until
this point, one thing has become clear.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her specialty is her sudden explosive power.
What she lacks in stamina, she makes up for in
acceleration.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She may not shine in a long-distance race like the
Kikuka Sho, but she would dominate in a sprint.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
What's with that face? I can't read minds, you
know. Use your words, Trainer.
choice_data_list: Are you sure you want to do the Kikuka Sho?
Are you sure you want to do the Kikuka Sho?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: ...Yes. It's part of the Triple Crown tour, after all.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: As a first-rate Umamusume, I have to run in it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She does have the ability to perform in medium-
and long-distance races. Furthermore...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I obviously have what it takes to succeed in the
Classics.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I can run both medium and long distances. I have
to... in order to be the best in the Triple Crown!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
If I want to be recognized as a first-rate
Umamusume, I must do it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The worldwide fame and success attained by her
mother weighs heavily on her shoulders.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But she's not the same as her mother. There are
different places where her potential can shine.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Trainer, please!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I know where you're coming from! But I have not
given you the right to broach that subject.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I want to win the Kikuka Sho. I want to leave my
mark on the Classics and the Triple Crown tour.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I'm ready. I've been ready ever since I came to
this academy.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: My mother will recognize my talent.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It seems there's no changing her mind now.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her legs may tremble, but it's my responsibility to
prevent their collapse under the challenges
ahead. We steer on towards the Kikuka Sho.
